retrieved_result: What does the term media mean in art? Art & Literature Fine Art Q: What does the term media mean in art? A: Quick Answer There are two definitions of media in artwork. Media as the plural for medium refers to the type of material used by an artist to create artwork. Media can also refer to substances.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses art terminology and is not about easy DIY room decoration ideas.
